title: Wausau, WI — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

content:
Overview

Wausau is a city in WI with a population of 39,000. Central Wisconsin city with Granite Peak ski area and the Leigh Yawkey Woodson Art Museum.
